# Incubators, Accelerators and SME Support

Monshaat runs and coordinates incubators, accelerators, and mentorship
programmes to support founders from idea stage through scaling. These are support
programmes — they are not guaranteed funding.

## What is available

- Incubation and acceleration tracks for early-stage companies.
- Mentorship and training for SME owners.
- Signposting to financing routes such as Kafalah (loan guarantees) and SVC's
  partner venture funds.

## Eligibility

Programme participation is assessed individually. Monshaat does not promise
acceptance, grants, or timelines.

## Next step

Browse current programmes and apply at https://www.monshaat.gov.sa/en.
